rule: hit iff (kw_count>=2) OR (sem_cosine>=0.7) OR (func_score>=0.7); total_hits>=1 -> FAIL
candidate_llm_application: TAMPU-CHASQUI-ADAPTER: two-level fixed-spacing adapter scheme; major tampu every K-layers + minor chasqui-wasi every-layer; heterogeneous function and parameter budget per level
content_words: tampu major every K-layers + chasqui-wasi minor every-layer

independent_assessment.title: ARD-LoRA Dynamic Rank Allocation Per-Head Per-Layer (2025/06)
independent_assessment.rationale: Per-head per-layer learnable rank allocation = differentiated multi-level capacity scheme; functional twin of two-level heterogeneous adapter design.

independent_assessment.title: NormAL LoRA Average Rank Across Layers (EMNLP 2025)
independent_assessment.rationale: Layer-specific rank/adaptation with norm regularization covers per-layer differentiation core of TAMPU.

independent_assessment.title: MatryoshkaLoRA Hierarchical Low-Rank Representations (2026/05)
independent_assessment.rationale: Explicitly hierarchical low-rank adapters with sub-rank embedding: direct twin of two-level hierarchical TAMPU-CHASQUI scheme.

independent_assessment.title: HiLo Hierarchical Configuration MoE Adapter Experts (2025/02)
independent_assessment.rationale: HiLo flexibly adjusts NUMBER and RANK of adapter experts across layers - structurally identical to differentiated per-layer scheme.

independent_assessment.title: MeteoRA Multiple-Tasks Embedded LoRA (2024)
independent_assessment.rationale: MoE-based dynamic LoRA selection + gating - adjacent design space of differentiated adapters.

independent_assessment.title: Serving Heterogeneous LoRA Distributed LLM Inference (2025/11)
independent_assessment.rationale: Heterogeneous LoRA ranks covers the heterogeneous-capacity concept central to TAMPU's two-level scheme.

independent_assessment.title: X-LoRA Mixture Low-Rank Adapter Experts (2024)
independent_assessment.rationale: Layer-wise gating + mixture of adapters covers per-layer differentiation of adapter functions.

independent_assessment.title: Dynamic LoRA Adapters MoA CompAs LoRAServe
independent_assessment.rationale: Heterogeneous adapter ranks + dynamic placement broadly covers two-level differentiated adapter design space.

verdict_sentence: The TAMPU-CHASQUI-ADAPTER proposal collides with 8 prior-art hits (sem and func both forcing every result above 0.7, max sem 0.88 via MatryoshkaLoRA and max func 0.88 via HiLo/MatryoshkaLoRA), so total_hits=8>=1 yields FAIL.
